span.p:
Every hour
Check overdue workflow steps
Generate overdue notifications

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Daily at 06:00
Letter due-date warnings (7-day)
Letters past due date
Daily summaries for Project Managers
Daily summaries for Regional Managers

span.p:

Catchment progress report
Send to all managers
